changeReason: Improved translation from Japanese. Old: "Radio Log"

TextENGNew: ``This is Unit 3. Reading you loud and clear.``
``Backup is en route. Hold your position until further orders.@k@vS20/00/KeijiC44003. Over.``
``Also, keep the lights off, please. Nice and quiet.``
changeReason: The original mistranslates 回転灯 (rotating/emergency lights) as 'headlights' and 静か静かで (nice and quiet) as 'radio silence'; the new version correctly identifies the request to keep emergency lights off and to approach quietly.

TextENGNew: ``The doctor just arrived. He wants to move the body. What should we do?@k@vS20/11/440700004. Over.``
changeReason: The original omits 運びたいそうですが (he says he wants to move [the body]), dropping the doctor's specific request that prompts the question to dispatch.

TextENGNew: ``Roger that. Understood.@k@vS20/11/440700006. ...Ah, backup just arrived as well.@k@vS20/11/440700007. Shouldn't we let them get photos first?@k@vS20/11/440700008. ...I'm pretty sure the victim's a goner.``
